PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?disciplineLabel ?playerLabel ?height WHERE {
  wd:Q799589 wdt:P527 ?discipline .
  ?discipline wdt:P1346 | wdt:P1614 | wdt:P1615 ?player .
  ?player wdt:P2048 ?height .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    ?discipline rdfs:label ?disciplineLabel .
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?disciplineLabel) = "en" && LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 3
